    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        set_variable = { name = DI_title_manager_building_level value = 1 }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {

        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_gfx_reset_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = gfx_reset_building
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_gfx_reset_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = gfx_reset_building } remove_building = gfx_reset_building }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = capital_bureau_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_capital_bureau_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = capital_bureau }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_slave_intrigue_01 } remove_building = agot_slave_intrigue_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_the_wall_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }

                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }

        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = monastery_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastery_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastery_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = monastery_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_monastery_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = monastery_04 } remove_building = monastery_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = monastery_03 } remove_building = monastery_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = monastery_02 } remove_building = monastery_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = monastery_01 } remove_building = monastery_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        }
                    }
                    add_building = small_ruin_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = small_ruin_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = small_ruin_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = small_ruin_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_small_ruin_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = small_ruin_04 } remove_building = small_ruin_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = small_ruin_03 } remove_building = small_ruin_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = small_ruin_02 } remove_building = small_ruin_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = small_ruin_01 } remove_building = small_ruin_01 }
            }
        }
    }

                else_if = { limit = { has_building = storms_end_04 } remove_building = storms_end_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = storms_end_03 } remove_building = storms_end_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = storms_end_02 } remove_building = storms_end_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = storms_end_01 } remove_building = storms_end_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_riverrun_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = riverrun_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_ruins_harrenhal_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = ruins_harrenhal_07
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_halgars_keep_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_halgars_keep_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_halgars_keep_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_halgars_keep_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_halgars_keep_02 } remove_building = agot_halgars_keep_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_halgars_keep_01 } remove_building = agot_halgars_keep_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_srunmued_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_srunmued_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_04 } remove_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_03 } remove_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_02 } remove_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_01 } remove_building = agot_srunmued_copper_mines_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_port_of_lys_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_red_temple_pentos_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }

        }
    }

DI_tm_building_agot_mothermont_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }

            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_02 } remove_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_01 } remove_building = agot_ruins_hellgate_hall_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_plankytown_01 } remove_building = agot_plankytown_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_atranta_01 } remove_building = agot_atranta_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_ruins_of_oldforge_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_ruins_of_oldforge_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_03 } remove_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_02 } remove_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_01 } remove_building = agot_ruins_of_oldforge_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                    add_building = agot_silverhill_01
                }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_agot_morne_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_morne_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_morne_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_morne_03
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_morne_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_morne_03 } remove_building = agot_morne_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_morne_02 } remove_building = agot_morne_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_morne_01 } remove_building = agot_morne_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_wolfs_den_03 } remove_building = agot_wolfs_den_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_wolfs_den_02 } remove_building = agot_wolfs_den_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_wolfs_den_01 } remove_building = agot_wolfs_den_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }

                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_bitterbridge_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_bitterbridge_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_honeyholt_apiaries_01
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_honeyholt_apiaries_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_honeyholt_apiaries_01 } remove_building = agot_honeyholt_apiaries_01 }

DI_tm_building_agot_gates_of_the_moon_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_gates_of_the_moon_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_02 } remove_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_01 } remove_building = agot_gates_of_the_moon_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            }

            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = agot_stonedance_01 } remove_building = agot_stonedance_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_agot_urban_farms_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = agot_urban_farms_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_agot_urban_farms_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = agot_urban_farms }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = city_walls_04 } remove_building = city_walls_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_walls_03 } remove_building = city_walls_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_walls_02 } remove_building = city_walls_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = city_walls_01 } remove_building = city_walls_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = apiaries_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_dense_growth_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = dense_growth_cleared } remove_building = dense_growth_cleared }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = dense_growth } remove_building = dense_growth }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_pirate_remnants_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {

                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = pirate_remnants
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = pirate_remnants_cleared
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = castle_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = castle_05
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_castle_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = castle_05 } remove_building = castle_05 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_04 } remove_building = castle_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_03 } remove_building = castle_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_02 } remove_building = castle_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = castle_01 } remove_building = castle_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6

                }
                else_if = {

                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }

                }
                else_if = {

                }
            }
        }
    }

            }
        }
    }

                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_march_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = march_03 } remove_building = march_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = march_02 } remove_building = march_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = march_01 } remove_building = march_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = generic_copper_mines_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_generic_copper_mines_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_04 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_03 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_02 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = generic_copper_mines_01 } remove_building = generic_copper_mines_01 }

DI_tm_building_caravanserai_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = caravanserai_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_caravanserai_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = caravanserai }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = watermills_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = hunting_grounds_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = hunting_grounds_08
                }
            }
        }
    }

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = ramparts_08
                }
            }
        }

                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_camps_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_camps_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_camps_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_camps_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = military_camps_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = temple_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = church_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = temple_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_temple_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = temple_04 } remove_building = temple_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_03 } remove_building = temple_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_02 } remove_building = temple_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = temple_01 } remove_building = temple_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = megalith_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_megalith_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = megalith }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_tribe_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = tribal_holding
                }
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = tribe_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = tribe_02
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_tribe_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = tribe_02 } remove_building = tribe_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = tribe_01 } remove_building = tribe_01 }
            }
        }
    }
}

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = special_the_wall_damaged } remove_building = special_the_wall_damaged }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_building_special_the_wall_graphical_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
        }

                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }

DI_tm_building_oath_warriors_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = oath_warriors_building_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = oath_warriors_building_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = oath_warriors_building_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = oath_warriors_building_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_oath_warriors_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = oath_warriors_building_04 } remove_building = oath_warriors_building_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = oath_warriors_building_03 } remove_building = oath_warriors_building_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = oath_warriors_building_02 } remove_building = oath_warriors_building_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = oath_warriors_building_01 } remove_building = oath_warriors_building_01 }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    is_valid = {
        OR = {
            NOT = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level }
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4
            var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5
        }
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            NOT = { scope:player = { has_variable = DI_title_manager_building_level } }
                            scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 1 }
                        }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_00
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 2 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_01
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 3 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_02
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_03
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = walls_04
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

DI_tm_destroy_building_walls_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building = walls_04 } remove_building = walls_04 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_03 } remove_building = walls_03 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_02 } remove_building = walls_02 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_01 } remove_building = walls_01 }
                else_if = { limit = { has_building = walls_00 } remove_building = walls_00 }
            }
        }
    }
}

                }
            }
        }
    }

DI_tm_destroy_building_citadel_shrine_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = citadel_shrine }
            }
        }
    }
}

                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 4 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_04
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 5 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_05
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 6 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_06
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 7 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_07
                }
                else_if = {
                    limit = {
                        scope:player = { var:DI_title_manager_building_level = 8 }
                    }
                    add_building = sacred_pool_08
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    scope = character # Player Character

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_02 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_03 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_04 } add_building = city_01 }
                if = { limit = { has_building_or_higher = city_05 } add_building = city_01 }

                DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = agot_amber_collection }

DI_construct_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    saved_scopes = {
        building_type # Flag of Building Type to construct
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_04
                            scope:building_type = flag:castle_05
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = castle_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = castle_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_04
                            scope:building_type = flag:city_05
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = city_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = city_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_02
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_03
                            scope:building_type = flag:temple_04
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = temple_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = church_holding
                }

                if = {
                    limit = {
                        OR = {
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_01
                            scope:building_type = flag:tribe_02
                        }
                        NOT = { has_building_or_higher = tribe_01 }
                    }
                    set_holding_type = tribal_holding
                }

                switch = {
                    trigger = scope:building_type
                    flag:gfx_reset_building = { add_building = gfx_reset_building }
                    flag:capital_bureau_01 = { add_building = capital_bureau_01 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_02 = { add_building = capital_bureau_02 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_03 = { add_building = capital_bureau_03 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_04 = { add_building = capital_bureau_04 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_05 = { add_building = capital_bureau_05 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_06 = { add_building = capital_bureau_06 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_07 = { add_building = capital_bureau_07 }
                    flag:capital_bureau_08 = { add_building = capital_bureau_08 }
                    flag:generic_dragon_pit_01 = { add_building = generic_dragon_pit_01 }
                    flag:agot_vineyard_01 = { add_building = agot_vineyard_01 }
                    flag:agot_vineyard_02 = { add_building = agot_vineyard_02 }
                    flag:agot_vineyard_03 = { add_building = agot_vineyard_03 }
                    flag:agot_lighthouse_01 = { add_building = agot_lighthouse_01 }
                    flag:agot_lighthouse_02 = { add_building = agot_lighthouse_02 }
                    flag:agot_lighthouse_03 = { add_building = agot_lighthouse_03 }
                    flag:agot_glass_gardens_01 = { add_building = agot_glass_gardens_01 }
                    flag:agot_glass_gardens_02 = { add_building = agot_glass_gardens_02 }
                    flag:agot_glass_gardens_03 = { add_building = agot_glass_gardens_03 }
                    flag:agot_scholastic_guilds_01 = { add_building = agot_scholastic_guilds_01 }
                    flag:agot_scholastic_guilds_02 = { add_building = agot_scholastic_guilds_02 }
                    flag:agot_scholastic_guilds_03 = { add_building = agot_scholastic_guilds_03 }
                    flag:agot_slave_diplomacy_01 = { add_building = agot_slave_diplomacy_01 }
                    flag:agot_slave_diplomacy_02 = { add_building = agot_slave_diplomacy_02 }
                    flag:agot_slave_diplomacy_03 = { add_building = agot_slave_diplomacy_03 }
                    flag:agot_slave_stewardship_01 = { add_building = agot_slave_stewardship_01 }
                    flag:agot_slave_stewardship_02 = { add_building = agot_slave_stewardship_02 }
                    flag:agot_slave_stewardship_03 = { add_building = agot_slave_stewardship_03 }
                    flag:agot_slave_martial_01 = { add_building = agot_slave_martial_01 }
                    flag:agot_slave_martial_02 = { add_building = agot_slave_martial_02 }
                    flag:agot_slave_martial_03 = { add_building = agot_slave_martial_03 }
                    flag:agot_slave_learning_01 = { add_building = agot_slave_learning_01 }
                    flag:agot_slave_learning_02 = { add_building = agot_slave_learning_02 }
                    flag:agot_slave_learning_03 = { add_building = agot_slave_learning_03 }
                    flag:agot_slave_intrigue_01 = { add_building = agot_slave_intrigue_01 }

DI_destroy_building_sgui = {
    scope = character # Player Character

    saved_scopes = {
        building_type # Flag of Building Base to destroy
    }

    effect = {
        save_scope_as = player

        every_in_list = {
            variable = DI_action_provinces
            save_scope_as = province

            scope:province = {
                switch = {
                    trigger = scope:building_type
                    flag:agot_amber_collection = {
                        DI_remove_building_type_effect = { BUILDING = agot_amber_collection }
                    }
                    flag:agot_ar_kon_barracks = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ar_kon_barracks_01 } remove_building = agot_ar_kon_barracks_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_arsenal = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_arsenal_01 } remove_building = agot_arsenal_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_ashemark = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ashemark_01 } remove_building = agot_ashemark_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_ashford_tourney_grounds = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_ashford_tourney_grounds_01 } remove_building = agot_ashford_tourney_grounds_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_atranta = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_atranta_01 } remove_building = agot_atranta_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_banefort = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_banefort_01 } remove_building = agot_banefort_01 }
                    }

                    flag:agot_bechester_motherhouse_ruins = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_bechester_motherhouse_ruins_02 } remove_building = agot_bechester_motherhouse_ruins_02 }
                        else_if = { limit = { has_building = agot_bechester_motherhouse_ruins_01 } remove_building = agot_bechester_motherhouse_ruins_01 }
                    }
                    flag:agot_bitterbridge = {
                        if = { limit = { has_building = agot_bitterbridge_02 } remove_building = agot_bitterbridge_02 }
